The '''''Concealer''-class Prison Ship''' was a 50-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] built by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]. It was used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to move [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] from one location to another. Two vessels operated by the Empire were the ''[[Caged Animal]]'' and the [[Constrictor (Concealer-class)|''Constrictor'']].
